title: Support - Tenant info persists after updating the app
scenario: Tenant information persists after updating the mobile app
steps: Register a mobile user on a tenant and verify tenant info is present in Poly Lens Menu > Support > App.
Install a new version of the mobile app, launch it, and verify the tenant info is still present (same as before the update).
expected: Tenant information persists after updating the mobile app (same as before the update).
